log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Goblin — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goblin — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:4+10=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 21 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: 46/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: 24/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
--- Goblin — Bardic Musician --- HP: 16/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (16/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Goblin — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Goblin — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Goblin — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 18 damage. Goblin — Bardic Musician HP: -2/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
